title: RicciNormalForm
summary: States symbolic Ricci-tensor components for an ambient metric in normal form.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: States symbolic Ricci-tensor components for an ambient metric in normal form.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/RicciNormalForm.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Component data appearing in the FG normal-form Ricci equations. Its mathematical data are: base Dim: the real numbers; g Prime: ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers; g Double Prime: ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers; base Ricci: ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers; cov Deriv GPrime: ι maps to ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{baseDim}&\colon \mathbb{R}\\\operatorname{gPrime}&\colon ι \longrightarrow ι \longrightarrow \mathbb{R}\\\operatorname{gDoublePrime}&\colon ι \longrightarrow ι \longrightarrow \mathbb{R}\\\operatorname{baseRicci}&\colon ι \longrightarrow ι \longrightarrow \mathbb{R}\\\operatorname{covDerivGPrime}&\colon ι \longrightarrow ι \longrightarrow ι \longrightarrow \mathbb{R}\end{aligned}
correspondence.leanType: structure RicciNormalFormComponents (ι : Type w) extends NormalInverseMetricComponents ι

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The trace g^{kl} g'_{kl}. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, its defining expression is ∑ k : ι, ∑ l : ι, C.g Inv k l times C.g Prime k l.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{tracePrime}(C)=\sum k \colon ι, \sum l \colon ι, C.\operatorname{gInv} k l \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} k l

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The trace g^{kl} g''_{kl}. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, its defining expression is ∑ k : ι, ∑ l : ι, C.g Inv k l times C.g Double Prime k l.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{traceDoublePrime}(C)=\sum k \colon ι, \sum l \colon ι, C.\operatorname{gInv} k l \cdot C.\operatorname{gDoublePrime} k l

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The quadratic term g^{kl} g'_{ik} g'_{jl}. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, and i, j of type ι, its defining expression is ∑ k : ι, ∑ l : ι, C.g Inv k l times C.g Prime i k times C.g Prime j l.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{quadraticPrime}(C,i,j)=\sum k \colon ι, \sum l \colon ι, C.\operatorname{gInv} k l \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} i k \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} j l
correspondence.leanType: def quadraticPrime (C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι) (i j : ι) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The scalar quadratic trace g^{kl} g^{pq} g'_{kp} g'_{lq}. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, its defining expression is ∑ k : ι, ∑ l : ι, ∑ p : ι, ∑ q : ι, C.g Inv k l times C.g Inv p q times C.g Prime k p times C.g Prime l q.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{quadraticTracePrime}(C)=\sum k \colon ι, \sum l \colon ι, \sum p \colon ι, \sum q \colon ι, C.\operatorname{gInv} k l \cdot C.\operatorname{gInv} p q \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} k p \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} l q

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The base-base part of the FG normal-form Ricci equation. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, and i, j of type ι, its defining expression is C.rho times C.g Double Prime i j minus C.rho times C.quadratic Prime i j plus 1 divided by 2 times C.rho times C.trace Prime times C.g Prime i j minus C.base Dim divided by 2 minus 1 times C.g Prime i j minus 1 divided by 2 times C.trace Prime times C.g i j plus C.base Ricci i j.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_ij}(C,i,j)=C.\operatorname{rho} \cdot C.\operatorname{gDoublePrime} i j - C.\operatorname{rho} \cdot C.\operatorname{quadraticPrime} i j + 1 / 2 \cdot C.\operatorname{rho} \cdot C.\operatorname{tracePrime} \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} i j - (C.\operatorname{baseDim} / 2 - 1) \cdot C.\operatorname{gPrime} i j - 1 / 2 \cdot C.\operatorname{tracePrime} \cdot g_{\mathrm{C}} i j + C.\operatorname{baseRicci} i j
correspondence.leanType: def FG_RicciEq_ij (C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι) (i j : ι) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The base-infinity part of the FG normal-form Ricci equation. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, and i of type ι, its defining expression is 1 divided by 2 times ∑ k : ι, ∑ l : ι, C.g Inv k l times C.cov Deriv GPrime k i l minus C.cov Deriv GPrime i k l.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_iInf}(C,i)=1 / 2 \cdot (\sum k \colon ι, \sum l \colon ι, C.\operatorname{gInv} k l \cdot (C.\operatorname{covDerivGPrime} k i l - C.\operatorname{covDerivGPrime} i k l))
correspondence.leanType: def FG_RicciEq_iInf (C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι) (i : ι) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The infinity-infinity part of the FG normal-form Ricci equation. In explicit terms, for c of type ricci normal form components ι, its defining expression is -1 divided by 2 times C.trace Double Prime plus 1 divided by 4 times C.quadratic Trace Prime.

A certificate that a symbolic ambient Ricci tensor satisfies the FG normal-form component formulas. Its mathematical data are: Ricci: Ambient Index ι maps to Ambient Index ι maps to the real numbers; ricci zero left: for every I : Ambient Index ι, Ricci Ambient Index.zero I equals 0; ricci zero right: for every I : Ambient Index ι, Ricci I Ambient Index.zero equals 0; ricci base base: for every i j : ι, Ricci Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.base j equals C.FG Ricci Eq ij i j; ricci base inf: for every i : ι, Ricci Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.inf equals C.FG Ricci Eq i Inf i; ricci inf base: for every i : ι, Ricci Ambient Index.inf Ambient Index.base i equals C.FG Ricci Eq i Inf i; ricci inf inf: Ricci Ambient Index.inf Ambient Index.inf equals C.FG Ricci Eq inf Inf.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{Ricci}&\colon \operatorname{AmbientIndex} ι \longrightarrow \operatorname{AmbientIndex} ι \longrightarrow \mathbb{R}\\\operatorname{ricci\_zero\_left}&\colon \forall I \colon \operatorname{AmbientIndex} ι, \operatorname{Ricci} \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} I = 0\\\operatorname{ricci\_zero\_right}&\colon \forall I \colon \operatorname{AmbientIndex} ι, \operatorname{Ricci} I \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} = 0\\\operatorname{ricci\_base\_base}&\colon \forall i j \colon ι, \operatorname{Ricci} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_ij} i j\\\operatorname{ricci\_base\_inf}&\colon \forall i \colon ι, \operatorname{Ricci} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_iInf} i\\\operatorname{ricci\_inf\_base}&\colon \forall i \colon ι, \operatorname{Ricci} \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_iInf} i\\\operatorname{ricci\_inf\_inf}&\colon \operatorname{Ricci} \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_infInf}\end{aligned}

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Ricci Normal Form Components ι, H of type Ricci Normal Form Certificate C, and I of type Ambient Index ι, H.Ricci Ambient Index.zero I equals 0.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{Fintype} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormComponents} ι,\;H\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormCertificate} C,\;I\colon \operatorname{AmbientIndex} ι,\quad H.\operatorname{Ricci} \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} I = 0
correspondence.leanType: theorem ricci_zero_left_normal_form [Fintype ι] {C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι} (H : RicciNormalFormCertificate C) (I : AmbientIndex ι) : H.Ricci AmbientIndex.zero I = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Ricci Normal Form Components ι, H of type Ricci Normal Form Certificate C, and i, j of type ι, H.Ricci Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.base j equals C.FG Ricci Eq ij i j.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{Fintype} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormComponents} ι,\;H\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormCertificate} C,\;i,j\colon ι,\quad H.\operatorname{Ricci} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_ij} i j
correspondence.leanType: theorem ricci_base_base_normal_form [Fintype ι] {C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι} (H : RicciNormalFormCertificate C) (i j : ι) : H.Ricci (AmbientIndex.base i) (AmbientIndex.base j) = C.FG_RicciEq_ij i j

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Ricci Normal Form Components ι, H of type Ricci Normal Form Certificate C, and i of type ι, H.Ricci Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.inf equals C.FG Ricci Eq i Inf i.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{Fintype} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormComponents} ι,\;H\colon \operatorname{RicciNormalFormCertificate} C,\;i\colon ι,\quad H.\operatorname{Ricci} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} = C.\operatorname{FG\_RicciEq\_iInf} i
correspondence.leanType: theorem ricci_base_inf_normal_form [Fintype ι] {C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι} (H : RicciNormalFormCertificate C) (i : ι) : H.Ricci (AmbientIndex.base i) AmbientIndex.inf = C.FG_RicciEq_iInf i

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Ricci Normal Form Components ι, and H of type Ricci Normal Form Certificate C, H.Ricci Ambient Index.inf Ambient Index.inf equals C.FG Ricci Eq inf Inf.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ricci_inf_inf_normal_form [Fintype ι] {C : RicciNormalFormComponents ι} (H : RicciNormalFormCertificate C) : H.Ricci AmbientIndex.inf AmbientIndex.inf = C.FG_RicciEq_infInf

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
